title: E2E: nickname with RTL override is rejected by relay
description: Why: verifies the full path from client request through relay to error response. What: add an integration test to relay/tests/ or extend e2e_jsonrpc.rs: (1) spawn relay; (2) connect a client; (3) send SET_NICKNAME with 'alice\u{202E}attacker' (contains RTL override); (4) wait for response; (5) assert response is an error (not success); (6) also send GROUP_CREATE with zero-width-char name 'group\u{200B}name'; (7) assert response is success (ZWS stripped); (8) if possible: send GROUP_LIST and verify stored name is 'groupname' (ZWS stripped). Oracle: SET_NICKNAME must fail (error response); GROUP_CREATE must succeed with stripped name.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-relay e2e passes; relay correctly rejects RTL, strips ZWS
close_reason: E2E test verifies RTL rejection and ZWS stripping; all tests pass
